description: Speed up curate dedup: embedding pre-filter via local Ollama+Jina, parallel LLM batch processing, larger default batch sizes.

criteria: Rust: No warnings in `cargo check` output
Rust: No warnings in `cargo clippy` output
Rust: All tests pass with `cargo test`
No breaking changes to existing APIs
globalAcceptanceCriteria.description: These criteria apply to ALL implementation tasks

mergeStrategy: Merge to main after MILESTONE-FINAL passes.

priorityPhilosophy.description: The hierarchy of what matters most when implementing tasks
hierarchy: 1. PLAN — Approach before code. Anticipate edge cases
2. FUNCTIONING CODE — Pragmatic, reliable code that works
3. CORRECTNESS — Compiles, type-checks, all tests pass
4. CODE QUALITY — Clean code, good patterns, no warnings
principles: No unnecessary abstractions — concrete structs over traits with one impl
Handle Option/Result explicitly; avoid unwrap() in production code
Graceful degradation when Ollama is unavailable

prohibitedOutcomes: Abstractions with only one concrete use
Error messages that don't identify what went wrong
Catch-all error handlers that swallow context

acceptanceCriteria: Migration v15 creates learning_embeddings table (learning_id PK, model, dimensions, embedding BLOB, created_at)
CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION bumped to 15
OllamaEmbedder struct: embed(), embed_batch(), is_available() using ureq
is_available() calls GET /api/tags with 3s timeout, checks model in list
store_embedding, load_embedding, load_all_active_embeddings, count_embedded functions
cosine_similarity: handles zero vectors (returns 0.0), identical (1.0), opposite (-1.0)
ProjectConfig extended with ollamaUrl and embeddingModel (#[serde(default)])
Unit tests: cosine_similarity edge cases, BLOB round-trip, store/load round-trip, load_all excludes retired learnings, load_all filters by current model
userStories.description: Foundation: learning_embeddings table, concrete OllamaEmbedder struct (no trait), embedding storage/load functions, cosine_similarity, ProjectConfig extension. Include unit tests for cosine_similarity math and BLOB round-trip.
userStories.notes: Foundation task. No trait — concrete OllamaEmbedder struct. Reference: $HOME/projects/external-ref/service/src/agent/kb/embedder.rs:82-145. Ollama API: POST /api/embed {"model": "...", "input": "text" | ["t1","t2"]}. Response: {"embeddings": [[...f32...]]}. Tags: GET /api/tags -> {"models": [{"name": "..."}]}. Default model: hf.co/jinaai/jina-embeddings-v5-text-small-retrieval-GGUF:Q8_0. BLOB: little-endian f32.

correctness: f32 BLOB round-trip must be exact
style: ureq not reqwest. TaskMgrResult<T>. #[serde(default)] on config fields.

userStories.title: Migration v15 + OllamaEmbedder + storage + cosine similarity + config

acceptanceCriteria: CurateAction::Embed variant with --force and --status flags
Handler in main.rs dispatches to embed logic
--status: prints embedded/total counts and model name
Default: checks Ollama, loads unembedded learnings, batch-embeds, stores
--force: re-embeds ALL active learnings
Model not found: error with 'Run: ollama pull <model>'
Zero-length content learnings skipped with warning
Progress and summary output
userStories.description: Add curate embed subcommand. Default: embed unembedded active learnings. --force: re-embed all. --status: show counts. Checks Ollama availability, errors with helpful message if unavailable or model not pulled.
userStories.notes: Embedding text: "{title}\n\n{content}". Title-only learnings embed title alone. Follow existing CurateAction pattern.

correctness: Check Ollama availability before starting, not after partial work
performance: Use batch embedding (array input) to minimize HTTP round-trips
style: Follow existing CurateAction pattern (Retire, Unretire, Dedup, Enrich)

userStories.title: CLI: curate embed command

acceptanceCriteria: cluster_by_embedding_similarity: loads embeddings, pairwise cosine, union-find, returns Vec<Vec<i64>>
When any embeddings exist, curate_dedup uses pre-filter path
Clustered learnings sent to LLM; singletons skipped
Learnings without embeddings collected into fallback batch(es) for LLM
Falls back entirely to current behavior when zero embeddings exist
Tests: 3 similar + 2 dissimilar = 1 cluster of 3; threshold boundary; transitive A~B B~C; empty input
userStories.description: Union-find clustering on cosine similarity. Integrate into curate_dedup: when embeddings exist, cluster candidates first, send only clusters to LLM. Learnings without embeddings go to a fallback batch. Include tests for clustering logic.
userStories.notes: Union-find: simple inline struct, path compression + union-by-rank, private helper. No arbitrary coverage threshold — use whatever embeddings exist. Similarity threshold slightly below LLM threshold to avoid false negatives.

correctness: Pre-filter must not false-negative — threshold below LLM threshold
style: Union-find as private helper, not public abstraction

userStories.title: Embedding pre-filter for curate dedup

acceptanceCriteria: process_batches_parallel: dispatches to worker threads, collects via mpsc
Workers only call spawn_claude — no DB access
Main thread processes merges in original order
--concurrency flag added (default: 2)
DedupParams gains concurrency: usize
Fallback batch size: (200_000 / avg_chars).clamp(20, 100)
Error in one batch does not block others
Tests: concurrency=1 same as sequential; error isolation; result ordering
userStories.description: Replace sequential batch loop with parallel dispatch using std::thread + mpsc. Add --concurrency flag (default 2). Increase fallback batch size to ~200K chars/batch clamped 20-100. Include tests with mock Claude binary.
userStories.notes: Pattern: Arc<Mutex<VecDeque>> work queue, mpsc::Sender for results. Spawn min(concurrency, batch_count) threads. Use CLAUDE_BINARY env for mock in tests. Existing sequential loop at curate/mod.rs:595-731.

style: std::thread + mpsc consistent with existing watchdog/monitor patterns

userStories.title: Parallel LLM batch processing + larger batch sizes

acceptanceCriteria: VectorBackend struct implements RetrievalBackend trait (retrieve, index no-op, remove)
retrieve: embeds query text, loads all embeddings, cosine similarity, returns top-N sorted
Score normalization: similarity * 15.0 for parity with FTS5/patterns
remove: deletes from learning_embeddings table
Added to CompositeBackend::default_backends()
Returns empty results when Ollama unavailable or no embeddings exist
Tests: retrieve sorted by similarity, empty embeddings returns empty, remove works, composite integration
userStories.description: Implement RetrievalBackend for vector similarity recall. Embeds query text via OllamaEmbedder, computes cosine similarity against stored embeddings, returns top-N. Add to CompositeBackend. Graceful degradation when Ollama unavailable. Include tests.
userStories.notes: No auto-embed via index() — keep it as a no-op. Users run `curate embed` explicitly. CompositeBackend already deduplicates by learning ID and keeps highest score, so vector results merge naturally.

correctness: VectorBackend must never cause errors — return empty on any failure
performance: Don't call Ollama if no query text provided. Health check 2-3s timeout.
style: Follow existing RetrievalBackend patterns in fts5.rs and patterns.rs

userStories.title: VectorBackend for learnings recall

acceptanceCriteria: No unwrap() in production code
All errors propagated with context
New modules exported and reachable from CLI entry points
No dead code warnings
Any issues found have CODE-FIX-xxx tasks added to JSON
userStories.description: Review all implementation for quality, error handling, security. Verify wiring: new modules exported, CLI subcommand registered, no dead code. Spawn CODE-FIX tasks for issues.
userStories.notes: For each issue: add CODE-FIX-xxx task (priority 11-14), add to VERIFY-001 dependsOn. Commit JSON.
userStories.title: Review implementation for quality, security, and wiring

cargo clippy -- -D warnings: clean
cargo fmt --check: clean
CLAUDE.md updated with Ollama/embedding config notes
Graceful degradation verified: all commands work with Ollama unavailable

userStories.notes: Final gate. Run full suite, update docs.
userStories.title: Final verification — all checks pass
